code:
fn double_positive(_ n: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  if n > 0
    Ok(n * 2)
  else
    Err("non-positive")
  end
end

fn add_ten(_ n: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  Ok(n + 10)
end

fn compose(_ n: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  let doubled = double_positive(n)?
  add_ten(doubled)
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  match compose(5)
  when Ok(v)
    print("result=#{v}")
  when Err(msg)
    print("error=#{msg}")
  end

  match compose(-3)
  when Ok(v)
    print("result=#{v}")
  when Err(msg)
    print("error=#{msg}")
  end

  Ok(())
end
